title: EXPLORE 3 — COUNTING dolls
prompt: Top-down high-angle shot in @dream-house. Five small dolls are laid out on the colorful play rug in a row in front of the Dream House. @Eva on the LEFT in a pink shirt, on hands and knees, finger touching each doll one by one as she counts slowly. @Sara stands on the RIGHT smiling. Eva (pointing each one carefully): "One, two, three, four, FIVE!" Eva (sitting back, proud): "Five dolls!" Sara: "All five for our Dream House!"
